title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Co-scientist is an AI agent system from Google that automates biomedical discovery. It identified novel treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other diseases by ranking hypotheses and discovering drug combinations that outperformed expert prediction.
